prompt: Create a vertical 9:16 cinematic sports poster of a confident male football champion walking slowly toward the viewer through a dark futuristic FIFA World Cup player tunnel into a packed stadium. He is shown full body, centered, wearing an all-black modern athletic tracksuit with a zip jacket, black pants, and black shoes, holding the golden FIFA World Cup trophy in one hand at chest height. The scene is rainy and dramatic, with wet reflective tunnel flooring, strong backlighting from the stadium entrance, bright white floodlights, mist, sparks, and explosive golden pyrotechnics behind him. The tunnel walls are dark blue-black metal panels with glowing digital World Cup graphics and readable-style branding, including FIFA, Qatar 2022, and World Cup trophy emblem panels, without making the text the main focus. Add exactly 4 floating soccer balls around the subject: one large ball on the lower left foreground, one smaller ball on the upper left side, one large ball on the mid-right wall area, and one ball near the lower right foreground, all with motion streaks. Add exactly 6 visible fan or photographer figures leaning in from the tunnel edges: two on the left side and four on the right side, some cheering with arms raised and one holding a bright camera flash. The stadium beyond the tunnel is crowded and glowing, with a curved roof structure visible at the top. Use high-contrast teal-and-gold color grading, ultra-realistic detail, dramatic depth of field, rain streaks, lens flares, glossy reflections, and a heroic World Cup entrance mood. Keep the subject’s face as front-facing but anonymized/blurred; if a real identity is provided, preserve facial identity exactly. Avoid cartoon style, avoid extra limbs, avoid distorted trophy shape, and avoid cluttered or unreadable typography.
